stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Find the flex temp and V-speeds given the following, interpolating as required: TOM: 71 000 kg, QNH 1013, wind 230/5 kt, OAT 12°C, visibility 500 m, ACS Packs ON, Runway condition WET.

options.a: 59°C, V<sub>1</sub> 137 kt, V<sub>R</sub> 137 kt, V<sub>2</sub> 141 kt
options.b: 55°C, V<sub>1</sub> 129 kt, V<sub>R</sub> 133 kt, V<sub>2</sub> 138 kt
options.c: 57°C, V<sub>1</sub> 131 kt, V<sub>R</sub> 134 kt, V<sub>2</sub> 139 kt
options.d: 57°C, V<sub>1</sub> 135 kt, V<sub>R</sub> 136 kt, V<sub>2</sub> 140 kt
